We You Bunleng and Marcel Lemonde the Co Investigating Judges ofthe Extraordinary
Chambers in the Courts ofCambodia
Noting the Law on the establishment ofthe Extraordinary Chambers dated 27 October 2004
Noting Rule 22 ofthe Internal Rules ofthe Extraordinary Chambers
Noting thejudicial investigation initiated against
LastName KHIEU FirstName Samphan Alias Hem
Sex male
Bora on 27 July 1931 at Commune ofRom Chek District ofRom Duol Province ofSvayRieng
Cambodia
Nationality Cambodian
Noting the designation by the Defense Support Section on request ofthe above mentionedperson of
Mr Jacques VERGES as his Co lawyer dated 08 January 2008
1 We accredite and recognise Mr Jacques VERGES as the Co lawyer ofthe above mentioned person
for aprovisional period until 31 January 2008
2 This lawyer is authorised to assist his client to freely communicated with him and to participate in
any investigative action
Dated the 09th day ofJanuary 2008 in Phnom Penh
